FSElevate
Overview Buttons Cards Forms Badges Gamification
Elevate / Components / Badges
Component

Badges

Compact status, reward, and skill markers for feedback-rich learning flows.

Usage

Use badges to label state, status, reward, and level metadata without competing with primary actions.

  • Keep badge copy short and scannable.
  • Use XP and gold badges only for rewards or progress outcomes.
  • Use level pills for learner identity or role-like achievement states.
Status badges States
Default Active Complete Review Blocked +180 XP Gold 
<span class="badge">Default</span>
<span class="badge badge-primary">Active</span>
<span class="badge badge-success">Complete</span>
<span class="badge badge-warning">Review</span>
<span class="badge badge-danger">Blocked</span>
<span class="badge badge-xp">+180 XP</span>
<span class="badge badge-gold">Gold</span>
Level pills Identity
4React Ranger 9Systems Shipper 
<span class="level-pill">
  <span class="level-dot">4</span>
  React Ranger
</span>
